variants.title: Filtrec A421G06V Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A421G06V. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A421G06V provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 117.0 mm, Length: 297.5 mm, Thread: 1 3/4"-12 UN 2B, Δ Collapse Pressure: 24 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Collapse Pressure: 24 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: Donaldson P171274 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax | Replaces the Filtrec A421G06V
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P171274 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax | Replaces the Filtrec A421G06V
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P171274 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax combines the convenience of a spin-on filter with the robust durability of Donaldsonâ€™s Duramax line. It offers high-efficiency filtration, effectively removing contaminants while withstanding high-pressure environments. Its spin-on design simplifies maintenance, allowing for quick and easy filter changes. Built for heavy-duty applications, this filter provides reliable performance in demanding hydraulic systems, helping to extend equipment life and reduce downtime.
